holdings.infoBox: COWZ is an equity ETF with a total of 99 individual holdings. The top holdings are QUALCOMM stock at 3.13%, CVS Health at 2.62%, Ford Motor Company at 2.45%, Altria Group at 2.14%, and ConocoPhillips at 2.00%.

overview.description: The Pacer US Cash Cows 100 ETF (COWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer US Cash Cows 100 index. The fund tracks a free cash flow-weighted index of companies selected from the Russell 1000 Index. COWZ was launched on Dec 16, 2016 and is issued by Pacer.
